purpose: Copy/paste-ready Hedera portal fields with final-link placeholders.

portal_fields.tagline: AI-powered Hedera-native compliance monitoring, response, and immutable audit trail.
portal_fields.problem_statement: Token issuers and compliance teams on Hedera need continuous monitoring, explainable risk detection, and regulator-grade evidence. Manual review and off-chain logs are slow, error-prone, and difficult to audit.
portal_fields.solution_summary: HederaShield ingests Hedera activity from Mirror Node, evaluates transfers with configurable rule logic plus optional AI context, supports HTS-native response workflows (freeze/wipe/KYC revoke), and writes immutable compliance evidence to HCS.
portal_fields.technical_implementation: FastAPI service + scanner + compliance engine + AI analyzer + enforcement adapter + HCS reporter + operator dashboard. Delivery includes deterministic packaging, submission validation, freeze manifest capture, and portal packet verification scripts.
hedera_integrations: Hedera Mirror Node REST API for transaction and account visibility
Hedera Token Service operations for enforcement workflows
Hedera Consensus Service topic publishing for immutable compliance logs
portal_fields.ai_agent_usage: Optional Anthropic Claude analysis for contextual risk enrichment and rationale generation. Final enforcement can remain human-controlled with dry-run safety mode enabled.
portal_fields.demo_summary: Demo shows suspicious activity ingestion, rule trigger + risk context, enforcement readiness path, and immutable HCS evidence output with reproducible scripts/artifacts.
portal_fields.impact: Near-real-time compliance response, stronger evidentiary posture, and Hedera-native execution instead of generic multi-chain heuristics.

operator_instructions: Run scripts/print_submit_now.sh immediately before portal submission.
Copy portal field text from this JSON (or HEDERA_PORTAL_SUBMISSION_PACKET.md) into the form.
Replace all placeholders with final public links and submitted commit SHA.
Confirm the latest readiness/verify/freeze reports are present and PASS.
Submit and archive a confirmation screenshot plus UTC timestamp.
